name: Resend
description: Developer-tools reference — cream + plain-black canvas, monospace woven into headlines, sharp grid alignment, dark-first surfaces for marketing pages. The brand stays out of the way of the code samples.

--color-paper-cream.role: Primary light surface — light-mode pages, code-sample card fills
--color-paper-cream.context: warm cream, the soft alternative to pure white

--color-jet-anchor.role: Primary text on cream, dark-mode background, hero anchor
--color-jet-anchor.context: plain black, no warmth, no apology

--color-cloud-whisper.role: Text on dark surfaces, button labels, inverted CTA fills

--color-graphite-body.role: Secondary body text, captions, supporting copy on cream

--color-ash-divider.role: Hairline dividers, code-block borders on light surfaces
--color-ash-divider.context: cream-tinted divider that disappears into the page

--color-shadow-surface.role: Elevated dark surface — modal backgrounds, dark-mode card fills
--color-shadow-surface.context: near-black lifted just enough to register against jet-anchor

--color-amber-spark.role: Optional accent — status pings, send-confirmation moments, rare CTA highlight
--color-amber-spark.context: warm signal-orange, used as a punctuation mark not a theme

--font-display-inter.role: Display headlines and section titles — clean geometric default

--font-mono-geist.role: Code samples, inline tokens, API endpoints, hero monospace accents woven into headlines

antiPatterns: Never use --color-amber-spark for surface fills — it earns its punch by appearing once per page max. As a theme it loses signal value entirely.

Display headlines must blend --font-display-inter and --font-mono-geist in the same line at least once on hero — the mono-in-sans cadence is the brand's signature move. A page with no mono accent does not read as Resend.
Never use --color-paper-cream and --color-cloud-whisper in the same section — they are opposite-mode tokens. Cream is for light pages, white is for text on black.
Avoid drop-shadows entirely — Resend separates surfaces with hairline borders and color steps. Soft shadows undercut the sharp-grid character.
